headline: Surgical Robotics Meets AI: Intuitive Surgical, Medtronic, and Stryker Are the Sleeper Plays of the Healthcare Boom
summary: Surgical robotics is quietly becoming an artificial intelligence story. Every robotic procedure generates structured video, kinematic, and outcomes data that platforms feed back into surgeon training, intraoperative guidance, and predictive analytics. That flywheel is the moat. The three companies owning the installed bases to build it are Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ: ISRG), Medtronic (NYSE: MDT), and ... Surgical Robotics Meets AI: Intuitive Surgical, Medtronic, and Stryker Are the Sleeper Plays
